slot_order_hot_only.read: Correct route-ordering surface; speedup is noise-level versus the clean baseline.

slot_order_hot_accum_slot_swizzle_1.read: This is the retained low-risk candidate: same HSK BF16 selected-limit producer and same route semantics, with hot route ordering plus the existing zero-extra-shared-memory slot/D swizzle.

hot_slot_fragment_count_4.followup_single_writer_fragment: TileLang layout inference rejected the owner-loop over the GEMM fragment, so hot-slot fragment accumulation is not enabled.
hot_slot_fragment_count_4.read: A per-thread fragment is not a correct replacement for the CTA shared accumulator unless the kernel also implements a lowering-compatible block reduction.

integration.guard: hot_slot_count is rejected in the adapter until a correct lowering-compatible local reduction exists.

decision.expected_e2e_impact: Small isolated dKV-body improvement only. This will not move end-to-end TFLOPs much until the broader sparse-MLA backward bridge avoids materialized probability/grad-logit tensors and the MoE/loss walls are addressed.
decision.next: If we keep pushing this branch, use profiler counters on the retained hot-order+swizzle kernel to confirm lower LDS bank pressure, then integrate the knob into a short TorchTitan A/B only after avoiding TileLang recompilation churn.
